name: libhackrf0
title: libhackrf0
summary: Software defined radio peripheral - runtime library
description:
Software defined radio peripheral - runtime library
HackRF is an open source Software Defined Radio that can receive
and transmit between 30 MHz and 6 GHz. HackRF has a 20 MHz bandwidth.
It is a High Speed USB device powered by the USB bus.
.
This package contains the shared library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libhackrf0 because Software defined radio peripheral - runtime library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libhackrf0 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libhackrf0 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libhackrf0 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
